title: taraxacum retroflexum
intro: Taraxacum retroflexum, commonly known as the bent dandelion or bent daisy, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. The plant's roots and leaves are rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, providing various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum retroflexum is often combined with other plants to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that support overall well-being and provide relief from various health conditions.
